scope.query_semantics: complete BscScan public token/normal address pages for only three senders, exact AKE contract row links, official receipt reconstruction

target_tracked_role.name: Binance Alpha 2.0 Proxy/Custody
target_tracked_role.evidence: 2026-06-29 Phalcon Invocation Flow review: CLO/RAVE buy traces show Router approving and depositing Alpha tokens to Binance Deposit/Proxy-Custody via 0xfed29397; KGEN sell trace shows Router pulling tokens from the same custody path via 0x5d7208c3. Promoted from suspect after nested call evidence.

post72_confirmed_dex_sell.evidence: same successful receipt contains AKE outbound and tracked BSC USDT inbound; transaction target is the tracked PancakeSwap Infinity Universal Router
post72_confirmed_dex_sell.fifo_note: the anchor lot had already left the sender and root-block ending balance was zero; sender-window FIFO attributes this sale to later visible inventory and does not establish a link to the 822,989,955 AKE root lot

senders.sale_intent: post72 transaction-level DEX sale confirmed; root transfer purpose and any downstream economic sale intent remain unresolved; sender-window FIFO does not link this sale to the root lot

relationship_review.interpretation: no exact shared inbound AKE source or exact shared direct native funder was observed; the shared post-root destination, 121.5-second AKE sequence, and adjacent direct native transfers form an address-level coordination candidate while common control remains unresolved

unresolved: direct Binance App screenshot-row links to the three candidate TXIDs
field-level mapping of the exact UI label Binance: Alpha Hot Wallet to the tracked target address
ownership, controlling entities, and economic roles of all three senders
common control among the three senders
official ownership and common economic-entity relationship of BscScan-labeled Binance funders
internal native BNB funding paths omitted by normal transaction pages
economic purpose of the root transfers and any sale intent tied to the three root lots; one later small DEX sale is separately confirmed
inventory or fully round-tripped AKE activity outside each bounded window despite complete current public address-page counts
roles of addresses absent from tracked global labels
